events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes a situation where the only photo of hangers & supports is blocked by packaging and glare. The visible outline suggests the right area, but identifying marks and connection details cannot be read. This is a case where insufficient evidence is available to make a determination.

Decision: needs_more_info
Risk: low (no evidence of danger, just can't see)
Work stage: rough-complete
Component conditions: none flagged (empty list)
Percent complete: estimate based on rough-complete stage, maybe 70-80%
Confidence: low, since we can't verify

Let me write the JSON.
